title: Zorbit Privilege Section
description: Schema for privilege sections that group related privileges in the navigation menu. Each section represents a top-level menu category (e.g. Dashboard, Identity, Admin).

id.description: Unique section identifier using short hash format.

section_code.description: Machine-readable section code. Used as a stable reference key.

section_label.description: Human-readable display label for the section.

icon.description: Material Icon name for the section.

seq_number.description: Display order of the section in the navigation menu. Lower numbers appear first.

visible.description: Whether this section is visible in the navigation menu.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the section was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update.
